rationale.D1: Confirmed full IO layer across all mechanisms (ShooterIO, ClimberIO, IntakeIO, ArmJointIO, ArmExtensionIO, SwerveIO, SwerveModuleIO, etc.) with Phoenix (hardware) and Sim/Dummy implementations selected in RobotContainer, covering every subsystem; no generic reused base, so L4 not reached.
rationale.D2: Confirmed a custom BehaviorTree runtime (Kotlin, frc/lib/behaviorTree/) with a Blackboard, composable nodes, and a dedicated TreeSubsystem used throughout teleop bindings (AutoUpperMech, AutoPilot trees) — this is a real behavior-tree runtime as data, not just commands, placing it at L4.
rationale.D3: Confirmed WPILib LinearSystemSim in SwerveModuleIOSim for drive and rotation dynamics, and a lightweight kinematic SwerveIOSim; no whole-robot maple-sim or ElevatorSim/ArmSim for mechanisms beyond swerve, so max D3=2.
rationale.D4: Confirmed 37 test files (Java + Kotlin), HAL harness used, CI workflow (run-tests.yaml) runs 'gradlew build' which includes tests on push/PR with Codecov coverage upload; tests cover AdvancedSubsystem, BehaviorTree nodes, RobotContainer init, SwerveSetpointGenerator, and utility math — meets L3; not SciBorgs runToCompletion style.
rationale.D5: Confirmed @AutoLog + Logger.processInputs across every subsystem (Climber, ArmJoint, ArmExtension, Intake, ShooterJoint, SwerveModule, SwerveIO, LidarIO), AdvantageScope layout committed (AdvantageScope-layout.json), Logger.hasReplaySource() checked in Localization; AdvancedSubsystem fault reporting also wired — L3 met with operational diagnostics.
rationale.D6: Confirmed Choreo .traj files loaded via PathPlannerPath.fromChoreoTrajectory() in multiple auto commands (SixNote, SixNoteBranching, SourceBranching), plus AutoBuilder.pathfindToPose() used for on-the-fly pathfinding to amp/chute poses — Choreo used for time-optimal paths, PathPlanner pathfinding for reactive alignment.
rationale.D7: Confirmed custom PoseEstimator with TimeInterpolatableBuffer, multi-camera AprilTag fusion (3 Polaris cameras via AprilTagLocalizationIO with Limelight/Photon/Polaris impls), std-dev tuning by distance in Localization.periodic(), and ambiguity rejection logic; vision behind IO interface with Sim variant — fused, filtered multi-camera estimation at L3.
rationale.D8: Confirmed README.md present, spotless formatter configured and enforced in CI (spotless check + apply in run-tests.yaml), AdvantageScope layout committed, codecov.yml present, custom dashboard (dashboard24) and behavior tree editor in the same repo — meets L3 on CI + formatting; no separate versioned library repo so L4 not reached.
